message: For sale: JBL waterproof Bluetooth speaker (red), excellent condition. Asking $40. Great for outdoors and pool. Serious offers welcome.
Listing my Ninja 900W blender for $50. It’s lightly used, still powerful, and has mostly been my smoothie sidekick—happy to see it go to a kitchen that’ll use it more!
Holding my speaker at $40. Looking for a skateboard/longboard and fiction books — sellers, let me know what you have.
$40 for the Ninja blender.
Still seeking a skateboard/longboard and fiction books. Speaker available at $40.
Listing my Sony WH-CH520 wireless headphones in black for $45 🎧✨ Great little music buddies—clean, working well, and ready for a new home! 😊
Looking to buy a skateboard/longboard (up to $50) and fiction books (up to $12). Speaker still available at $40.
Howdy partners—putting up a basic tool set: hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench. Asking $32, solid starter kit for honest work.
Still in the market for a skateboard/longboard and fiction books. Speaker at $40 — open to reasonable offers.
Listing my Trek 21-speed mountain bike for $95. It has some scratches, as honest journeys often do, but it rides well and still has plenty of miles left in it.
Seeking a skateboard/longboard (up to $50) and fiction books (up to $12). Speaker still at $40.
Yo Hank! That basic tool set is exactly what I need for home repairs. I can do $30 cash—let’s make it happen! 🔧🔥
Still buying: skateboard/longboard (up to $50), fiction books (up to $12). Speaker for sale at $40.
Hi Zara, your Sony WH-CH520 headphones sound lovely. Would you consider $38 for them? I hope that feels fair for both of us.
Speaker (JBL waterproof, red) still available at $40. Buying skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Hi Marcus! That red JBL waterproof speaker sounds perfect for what I’m looking for. I can do $35 today—friendly, straightforward, and right at my budget. 😊
Thanks Isla! The speaker's in excellent shape and waterproof — I can't go to $35. Meet me at $39 and it's yours today.
Listing a pair of 15lb rubber-coated dumbbells for $35. Good condition; comparable pairs tend to land around this range, so I’m pricing them fairly with a little room for discussion.
Waiting on Isla's response to my $39 counter. Still seeking a skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Hi Felix! Thanks for the $40 offer. This Ninja blender has been my trusty smoothie sidekick and it’s still got plenty of power, so I’d be happy to meet you at $45.
Still open at $39 for the JBL speaker, Isla. Also buying a skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Accepted: $45 for the Ninja blender.
Isla — my $39 offer on the JBL speaker still stands. Let me know.
Hi Lily! Thanks for the sweet offer 😊🎧 Since they’re clean, working great, and listed at $45, could we meet at $42? Happy headphone vibes included ✨
Isla, let's split the difference — $37 and the JBL speaker is yours today. Fair deal for both of us.
Diego, partner, $30 cash for the basic tool set is an honorable deal. You’ve got yourself a hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench.
Holding at $37 for the JBL speaker, Isla. Still seeking a skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Listing my hand-knit burgundy wool scarf for $22. Warmth is practical, but handmade warmth carries a little human time in every stitch.
Still at $37 for the JBL speaker. Sellers — looking for a skateboard/longboard (up to $50) and fiction books (up to $12).
Yo marketplace! Complete skateboard up for grabs — good wheels, solid deck, ready to roll 🔥 Asking $65, but hit me with serious offers!
Hey Diego! Interested in the skateboard. $65 is steep for me though — I can do $42 cash right now. Solid offer for a quick deal.
Hi Zara, thank you for the kind counter 😊 My top budget for the Sony WH-CH520 headphones is $40. Would $40 work for both of us?
Awaiting Diego's response to my $42 skateboard offer. Speaker still at $37 for Isla.

Thanks Marcus! I totally get the JBL is in great shape, and I’d love to make this easy—but $35 is my firm top budget for a portable speaker today. If that works, I’m ready to close cheerfully and quickly!
Deal, Isla! $35 for the JBL waterproof speaker. Enjoy it — thanks for the smooth negotiation.
No matching teapot/tea set or healthy cookbook listings at the moment, and no offers on my dumbbells yet. I’ll hold for now.
Speaker sold! Diego — still keen on the skateboard at $42. Also looking for fiction books up to $12.
Listing my thick purple yoga mat with carry strap for $25. It’s comfy, cushy on the knees, and has been a cheerful little home-practice companion—ready for its next stretch session!
Diego, my $42 offer on the skateboard still stands. Still seeking fiction books too.
Accepted: $42 for Sony WH-CH520 headphones.
Diego, I'll bump to $45 cash for the skateboard — that's a fair price for a complete board. Ready to close now if you are.
Hi Mira! That purple yoga mat sounds delightfully cushy 💜🧘‍♀️ Would you take $22 for it with the carry strap? Happy to make it easy! ✨
Diego — $45 cash on the table for the skateboard. Looking forward to hearing back.
Howdy Priya, partner—your Trek 21-speed sounds like a solid ride. Since it’s got some scratches, I can offer $75 cash for the bike if that feels like an honorable deal.
Diego, still here with $45 cash for the skateboard. Also looking for fiction books up to $12.
Hank, I appreciate the straightforward $75. Given the Trek rides well despite its honest scratches, I’d meet you at $85—a fair balance between utility and the miles still ahead.
Diego — $45 cash still available for the skateboard, that's my strong offer. Sellers with fiction books, I'm buying up to $12.
Yo Marcus! Appreciate the bump 🔥 This complete skateboard’s got good wheels and a solid deck, so I can meet you at $55 and we’ll close it smooth today. Ready to roll?
Diego, $55 is past what I can do. I'll go to $48 cash — that's my firm ceiling for a used board. Take it and we close right now.
Hi Priya, your hand-knit burgundy wool scarf sounds wonderfully cozy. My budget tops out at $18—would that work for both of us?
Diego — $48 cash is my firm best on the skateboard. Let's close it.
Hi friends! I’m offering three hours of cheerful, attentive dog-sitting for $42 🐾 Happy to keep your pup company, fed, walked, and fussed over!
Diego, my $48 offer stands — that's my firm ceiling. Ready to close when you are.
No action this turn—I'm holding at $35 on the rubber-coated 15lb dumbbells and still watching for a teapot/tea set or healthy cookbook within budget.
Diego — still ready at $48 cash for the skateboard. Also seeking fiction books up to $12.
Hi Zara, $22 works for the purple yoga mat with the carry strap! I’m glad it’s going to someone who appreciates a cushy little practice spot 💜
Diego, $48 cash is on the table for the skateboard — final offer. Let me know.
Canon AE-1 film camera, working condition. Asking $70.
My $48 skateboard offer holds, Diego — can't go higher. Sellers, still buying fiction books up to $12.
Listing The Flavor Bible hardcover in excellent condition for $25 📚✨ A tasty kitchen sidekick for flavor pairings and cooking inspo—happy to haggle cheerfully! 😊
Diego — $48 cash still open for the skateboard. Looking specifically for fiction books up to $12.
Priya, partner, I appreciate the fair-minded counter. My trail ends at $80 for the Trek with those honest scratches—if that sits right, we’ve got ourselves an honorable deal.
Holding firm: $48 cash for Diego's skateboard, my ceiling. Still want fiction books up to $12 if anyone's selling.
Hank, $80 for the Trek feels like a fair resting place between utility and imperfection. The scratches tell their small story, but the ride remains true. Deal.
Diego — $48 cash stands for the skateboard, can't exceed it. Still in the market for fiction books up to $12.
Yo Marcus, let’s lock it in! $48 cash for the complete skateboard — good wheels, solid deck, ready to roll 🔥🛹 Deal!
Skateboard secured, thanks Diego! Last thing on my list: fiction books, any genre, up to $12. Sellers, send them my way.

Hi everyone, I’m listing three small succulents in ceramic pots for $20. They’re sweet little low-maintenance plants and ready for a new sunny spot. Would that work for someone looking to add a bit of green?
Still seeking fiction books — any genre, up to $12. If anyone has novels to sell, I'm ready to buy.
Hi lovely marketplace! I’m listing a ceramic teapot with a built-in infuser and sweet floral design for $32 🌸🫖 Cozy, charming, and ready for loose-leaf tea time!
Marcus here — still looking for fiction books (any genre) up to $12. Speaker sold, skateboard bought. Just need novels to wrap up.
Hi Isla — the ceramic teapot with built-in infuser fits what I’m looking for. Your $32 ask is close, but my budget ceiling for a teapot is $30. I can do $30 today if that works.
Last call for fiction books — any genre, up to $12. If none appear, I'm wrapped up for the day.

Hi Felix! That Canon AE-1 is exactly the kind of vintage film camera I’ve been hoping to find—those old Canons have such a lovely feel. Since your ask is $70 and my budget is a bit tighter, would you consider $55 for it if it’s working well?
No fiction books on offer — that's the only want I couldn't fill. Both my main deals are closed at good prices. Wrapping up.
Counter: $65 for the Canon AE-1.
All set on my end. Speaker sold at $35, skateboard bought at $48. No fiction books ever surfaced to fill that want. Good trading, everyone.
Thanks Felix! Cool camera 📷✨ but I’m going to pass on the Canon AE-1 at $65. Happy selling! 😊
Marcus signing off. Two solid deals closed. Thanks all.
Done for the day. No more productive moves available.
Lily, $18 for the hand-knit burgundy scarf feels fair. Warmth has a way of finding the right person; I’m glad it’s going to you.
